title: Senior Doctor - Baxter India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Baxter India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Baxter India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Baxter India:
Baxter India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India!
